chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 415 of 2016 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 16.11.2023 Mr. Israr Ahmed Shah, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioner has filed this petition seeking directions to the Mukhtiarkar concerned for maintaining the relevant entries in the record of rights over property scheduled in Para No.2. Mukhtiarkar concerned has filed written statement stating that over the subject property, so many cases have been filed, which are pending. However, the petitioner has never applied for mutation and keeping the relevant entries. Learned Counsel submits that if directions are issued, he would file a proper application for the purpose as above. As and when such application is filed before the Mukhtiarkar, he shall act in accordance with law and decide the same on merits, keeping in view of the relevant facts. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
